== Notes for [[Item:Q105434|Q105434]] ==

* [https://www.biblegateway.com/passage/?search=Matthew+1&version=KJV Matthew 1:13-14.]

Wikipedia: [http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matthew_1:13 Matthew 1:13] - [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matthew_1:14 1:14].

Mat 1:13, 14

OR "AZURE"(BLUE)

Helper
Continue 527 in House of Adam book.

Helper
Continue 527 in House of Adam book.

Mat 1:13, 14

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008785368331

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]][[Category:Pages]]
